productDisplayName: Nike Men Ball Carry Navy Blue Backpacks
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space to even carry a football, this also makes for a great everyday bag to school, college and even work.Height: 19"Width: 15" Depth: 10" Capacity: 32 litresBody made of 64% polyester and 36% nylon, with an inner lining made of 78% nylon and 22% polyesterBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a small pouch that has a velcro closureOne front zippered compartment with two zippered side pouchesSynthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles and ergonomically padded back for carrying easeNike swoosh printed on the frontWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)CareWipe with a damp cloth when necessary Hand wash onlyLine dry
